label: conmon_query_batch_architecture
summary: Conmon queries should be event-driven per-device, not batched

history.note: discover_and_populate sends 0x00C1 and 0x0061 to all devices simultaneously. AD4D and LX-DANTE don't respond to 0x0061 when queried alongside other devices (but respond fine when queried individually). Fix: send conmon queries per-device as they're discovered, not in batch. Single top-level timeout as cutoff.
Per-device sequential queries with response waiters, retry for slow devices, daemon retry task at 3s/5s/10s
